title: RM-05 KZ-1 runners
objective:
Run script:
"""
queue_path = Path('governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
for task in queue.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('id') == 'RM-05':
        task['status'] = 'IN_PROGRESS'
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T11:38:00Z'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
base = Path('governance/runners')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
runners = []
repaired = []
for i in range(1, 15):
    p = base / ('kz1_runner_' + str(i).zfill(2) + '.py')
    runners.append(str(p))
    required = "RUNNER_ID='kz1_runner_" + str(i).zfill(2) + "'; print({'runner':RUNNER_ID,'status':'ok','release_pass':False})\n"
    if (not p.exists()) or len(p.read_bytes()) < 50:
        p.write_text(required, encoding='utf-8')
        changed_files.append(str(p))
        repaired.append(str(p))
manifest = Path('governance/runners/KZ1_RUNNER_MANIFEST.json')
manifest.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'RM-05','runner_count':14,'runners':runners,'pre_kz_dependencies_done':['RM-01','RM-02','RM-03','RM-04'],'workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(manifest))
state = Path('governance/state/RM05_KZ1_RUNNERS_AFTER_PRE_KZ_BLOCK.json')
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'RM-05','trace_id':'rm05_kz1_runners_after_pre_kz_block','status':'completed','release_pass':False,'runner_count':14,'runners':runners,'repaired':repaired,'pre_kz_dependencies':['RM-01','RM-02','RM-03','RM-04'],'workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'RM-05B record RM-05 result and close queue'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/RM05_KZ1_RUNNERS_AFTER_PRE_KZ_BLOCK.md')
report.write_text('# RM-05 | KZ-1 runners skeleton repair after pre-KZ block\nStatus: completed\nDate: 2026-06-04\n\n## Dependencies\nRM-01..RM-04 are complete, so KZ-1 runner skeleton scope can be validated in the updated roadmap order.\n\n## Result\n14 runner skeleton files are present under governance/runners and listed in governance/runners/KZ1_RUNNER_MANIFEST.json. Repaired files: ' + json.dumps(repaired, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n\n## Workflow lock\nRespected. No .github/workflows files touched.\n\n## Next\nRM-05B record RM-05 result and close queue.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
